headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -95.9)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 8% over 7 days (weak momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 165 quotes and an overwhelming 138 at strong intensity - people are really fired up today.

• The frustration score of 75.9 sits in the upper half of the 140-day range but well below the peak of 164.7.

• Optimism dropped significantly from yesterday (-44.4 vs -23.4) while fears held steady near recent lows.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
